title: Spacey Figurines
description: A simple figurines mod, made for ModFest: Toybox.
body:
A simple mod adding support for JSON-defined figurines. No content is provided directly, and "figurine packs" (read: a fancy term for "buncha text") must be installed to the mod's config folder, `config/figurines`. 

Each figurine has a texture, name, description, rarity, category, # in said category, and optionally some voicelines.

Can you collect* them all?

*Note: Figurines not yet obtainable.
